s: In 2021, Dusten Knight suited up for BAL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 9.350, WHIP 1.850, SO 11, WAR 0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (BAL -> TBR).
In 2022, Dusten Knight suited up for TBR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.730, WHIP 1.360, SO 9, WAR -0.300. Notable context: Joined TBR.
